overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through open grasslands under a full moon. The character travels along a dirt path before turning to cross the prairie, passing rocks and trees, eventually approaching a wooden signpost where other riders become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: moonlit dirt trail through open prairie

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through grassland with trees to the right

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
group of leafy oak trees lining the path
dark mountain range silhouetted against the night sky
bright full moon illuminating the scene through scattered clouds
tall prairie grass swaying in the breeze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit prairie with the character walking along a dirt path. Oak trees line the right side while open grassland stretches to the left, with distant mountains visible under a bright full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered rock formations

events.description: character turns left off the dirt path and begins walking across the open grassland

agents.ego_description: turning sharply left off the trail and walking toward a large rock formation

entered.detail: large gray boulder sitting in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dirt path and turns left across the open grassland, passing a large rock formation. The terrain becomes more open with scattered bushes while the distant mountains remain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open grassland toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: tall wooden cross-shaped signpost marking a trail intersection
weathered wooden posts marking a boundary line

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the expansive grassland as a wooden signpost comes into view on the left. The terrain is flat and open with fence posts visible to the right and mountains dominating the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail intersection with distant riders

events.description: riders on horseback become visible in the distance ahead on the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the path toward the signpost with other riders visible ahead in the moonlight

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback moving along the distant trail

entered.detail: dirt trail reappearing as the character approaches the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a wooden signpost marking a trail intersection, returning to a dirt path. In the distance ahead, other riders on horseback become visible, adding a sense of life to the otherwise empty prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a moonlit prairie that transitions from a sheltered dirt path into an expansive open grassland. It begins with the character walking along a trail lined with oak trees on the right and distant mountains under a bright full moon. As the character leaves the path and turns left, the scene opens up into a wide expanse of grassland and scattered bushes, passing a large rock formation. The camera then continues across the flat terrain, passing fence posts as a wooden signpost emerges on the left against the dominating mountain horizon. Finally, the character passes the signpost to return to a dirt path, where other riders on horseback appear in the distance to break the solitude of the prairie.
